title: ANTFARM - 211info
text: ANTFARM ANTFARM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides indoor and outdoor activities supporting healthy lifestyles for youth, as well as mentorship, counseling and support. Supports families and seniors in finding resources and problem-solving. 39140 Proctor Boulevard Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Saturday 8am-5pm Email (503) 668-7962 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 668-7962 Main phone (503) 668-9955 Alternate Administration (503) 668-7962 Anne Stevens [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or walk in for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Youth Agricultural Programs Youth Community Service Programs Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - AXIS LEARNING CENTER EMPLOYMENT - YOUTHCORE FOOD - ANTFARM LEARNING GARDENS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COMMUNITYCONNECT INFORMATION SERVICES - NUEVO FUTURO If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ANTFARM
